text: Hey, so the problem on this with this file is whenever I'm processing a new set of data, the formula on the combined GRABM and ABM SNH sheet, the formulas that you see on column G and column key, they are becoming invalid. It's errors, which is why it's just giving those hash ref after I process new set of data. Now, surprisingly, when I process old set of data, it's still working fine, so I'm not sure what's going on. It's clearly something wrong with a new set of files that I'm processing, which is why I also tried changing the new files with the old files and keeping everything else the same, but it still messes up with the formula for some reason. I'm not sure what exactly is going on, but we need to find that out. Thank you.
